verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You must be faithful, Over a few things, To be ruler over many things, Bet thou faithful, unto death, And God will give you a crown of life. And God will give you a crown of life.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So if you have a song to sing, Faithfully sing that song If you have some love to show, Show it the whole day long

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: If you have a kind word to say, Try to say it, each and every day If you have not a prayer to pray, Pray on in Jesus name

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Be ye steadfast, unmovable, Always abounding In the work of God

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Know that your labor, is not in vain, You shall receive a just reward Be thou faithful, And God will give you a crown of life, And God will give you a crown of life.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Well done, Good and faithful servant, well done! Be thou faithful, And God will give you a crown of life, And God will give you a crown of life.
